data.title: Cathie Wood Hunts For Crypto Bargains Amid Bitcoin Decline, Ark Loads Up On Robinhood And Coinbase
data.description: On Thursday, Cathie Wood‘s Ark Invest made significant trades, focusing on acquiring shares in Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD), Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ:COIN), and

data.title: Spirit Airlines Soars Out of Bankruptcy, Says Will Cancel Old Stock And Expects To Re-List 'As Soon As Reasonably Practicable'
data.description: Spirit Aviation Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Spirit Airlines, LLC (OTC: SAVEQ) announced that it has successfully completed its financial restructuring.

data.title: Shein CEO Says 'Zero Conversations' About Slashing $66B Valuation Ahead Of IPO, Backers Unfazed Amid Trump Tariff Woes
data.description: Donald Tang, the Executive Chair of fast-fashion retailer Shein, assured that the company is preparing for a London listing while dismissing concerns about the company's valuation.

data.title: Bitcoin's Two-Year Bull Run At Risk? Analyst Says Chart Hints At 'Potential Trend Shift' — Asks Followers To Watch This Level Closely
data.description: On Thursday, prominent cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez shared insights on Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) potential price movements.

data.title: Chuck Schumer Says A Government Shutdown Will Give Trump The 'Keys To The City, State and Country' And Elon Musk The Chance To Destroy Government Services
data.description: Chuck Schumer warned on Thursday that a government shutdown could empower Trump and accuses Musk of supporting it to dismantle key programs.
